description: CompositionCharcoal grey T-shirt made of 55% cotton and 45% polyester, has a round ribbed neck in red, long raglan sleeves with two red panels on the right sleeve, branding in graphic and flock print on the left chestFitRegularWash careMachine wash at 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleachTumble dry normal or line dryWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsVintage styling on this classic T-shirt is a sure-fire way of upping your style statement. This tee from locomotive is crafted from a soft cotton/polyester blend to offer exemplary comfort which, along with its fashionable styling, makes this a great addition to your wardrobe. Pair it with form fitting denims and casual shoes.Model statisticsThe product is a size S on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
